---
title: "GLEAM differential analysis guide"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM differential analysis guide}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
library(GLEAM)
library(Seurat)

ifnb_path <- system.file("extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds", package = "GLEAM")
if (ifnb_path == "") ifnb_path <- file.path("inst", "extdata", "full_examples", "ifnb_seurat.rds")
seu <- readRDS(ifnb_path)
if (ncol(seu) > 5000) seu <- subset(seu, cells = colnames(seu)[1:5000])

expr_ifnb <- tryCatch(
  Seurat::GetAssayData(seu, assay = DefaultAssay(seu), layer = "counts"),
  error = function(e) Seurat::GetAssayData(seu, assay = DefaultAssay(seu), slot = "counts")
)
meta_ifnb <- seu@meta.data
if (!"sample" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) meta_ifnb$sample <- if ("orig.ident" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) as.character(meta_ifnb$orig.ident) else "sample_1"
if (!"group" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) meta_ifnb$group <- if ("stim" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) as.character(meta_ifnb$stim) else ifelse(seq_len(nrow(meta_ifnb)) <= nrow(meta_ifnb)/2, "A", "B")
if (!"celltype" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) meta_ifnb$celltype <- if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(meta_ifnb)) paste0("cluster_", meta_ifnb$seurat_clusters) else as.character(Idents(seu))

sc <- score_signature(
  expr = expr_ifnb,
  meta = meta_ifnb,
  geneset = "immune_small",
  geneset_source = "builtin",
  species = "human",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "rank",
  min_genes = 3,
  verbose = FALSE
)
```

## Comparison levels

`test_signature()` supports multiple levels:

- `cell` (exploratory)
- `sample`
- `celltype`
- `sample_celltype`
- `pseudobulk`
- `region`
- `sample_region`
- `trajectory`

## Common patterns

```{r, eval=FALSE}
res_cell <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", level = "cell", method = "wilcox")
res_sample <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", level = "sample", method = "wilcox")
res_celltype <- test_signature(sc, celltype = "celltype", group = "group", level = "celltype", method = "wilcox")
res_sample_celltype <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", celltype = "celltype", level = "sample_celltype")
res_pb <- test_signature(sc, group = "group", sample = "sample", celltype = "celltype", level = "pseudobulk")

res_wct <- test_signature(
  score = sc,
  group = "group",
  sample = "sample",
  celltype = "celltype",
  target_celltype = "CD8_T",
  level = "sample"
)
```

## Differential result visualizations

```{r, eval=FALSE}
plot_volcano(res_pb)
plot_celltype_compare(res_celltype)
plot_group_in_celltype(res_wct)
```
